intent.chart_title: Fertility Rate Distribution Across Countries and Years
intent.description: Show the distribution of fertility rate across countries and years using a statistical chart.
intent.title: Fertility Rate Distribution Across Countries and Years

raw_output:
{
  "intent": {
    "type": "TemporalStatistical",
    "title": "Fertility Rate Distribution Across Countries and Years",
    "description": "Show the distribution of fertility rate across countries and years using a statistical chart.",
    "data_fields": [
      { "field_name": "country_code", "role": "id" },
      { "field_name": "country", "role": "dimension" },
      { "field_name": "year", "role": "time" },
      { "field_name": "fertility_rate", "role": "measure" }
    ],
    "temporal_support": {
      "min_year": 1960,
      "max_year": 2024,
      "distinct_years": 65,
      "recent_10_start": 2015,
      "recent_10_end": 2024,
      "previous_10_start": 2005,
      "previous_10_end": 2014,
      "granularity": "year"
    },
    "visualization_type": "Statistical Chart",
    "chart_title": "Fertility Rate Distribution Across Countries and Years",
    "x_axis_label": "Country Code",
    "y_axis_label": "Year",
    "measure_label": "Fertility Rate (births per woman)"
  }
}

gold.unsupported_reason: monthly granularity is not available; schema has annual year values

intent.name: Show monthly fertility rate trends for Indonesia

raw_output:
{
  "intent": {
    "name": "Show monthly fertility rate trends for Indonesia",
    "dataset_title": "ASEAN fertility rate",
    "domain": "population",
    "source": "World Bank Indicators API",
    "language": "en",
    "schema_fields": [
      { "name": "country_code", "type": "nominal", "role": "id" },
      { "name": "country", "type": "nominal", "role": "dimension" },
      { "name": "year", "type": "temporal", "role": "time", "unit": "year" },
      { "name": "fertility_rate", "type": "quantitative", "role": "measure", "unit": "births per woman" }
    ],
    "temporal_support_metadata": {
      "time_field": "year",
      "year_min": 1960,
      "year_max": 2024,
      "distinct_years": 65,
      "recent_10_start": 2015,
      "recent_10_end": 2024,
      "previous_10_start": 2005,
      "previous_10_end": 2014,
      "temporal_granularity": "year",
      "latest_year": 2024
    },
    "visualization_type": "Temporal-Statistical"
  }
}
